description: Complete the partially-drawn Causal Loop Diagram (CLD) for urban traffic congestion in '~/Diagrams/traffic_congestion_cld.drawio' according to the model specification in '~/Desktop/cld_requirements.txt'. The updated diagram must incorporate the 8 missing variables, causal links with polarity labels ('+' or '-'), and annotations for the 5 feedback loops (R1, R2, B1, B2, B3) identifying them as Reinforcing or Balancing. Include a legend explaining the notation and export the final diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/traffic_congestion_cld.pdf'.
